note: design↔live element correspondence for the v3 Chats destination. DESIGN = design-kit/app-v3/copilot-app.jsx:111-143 (ChatRow + ChatsSurface over the CHATS fixture in copilot-data.jsx:192-201), styled by copilot.css:280-295 / 108-118. LIVE = packages/chat-surface/src/destinations/chats/ChatsArchive.tsx:168 (NOT ChatsDestination.tsx — that file is mounted by neither host, see FINDINGS), rendered — with the shell Topbar stacked above it (PRD-09 un-full-bleeds chats) — by lib/render-live-chats-topbar.test.tsx into surfaces/chats/live/default.html. The live tree carries only 4 class hooks (.pg-lead, .sect-h, .rowlist, .ui-button) — every other style is an inline CSSProperties object — so live selectors are data-testid driven. Design structural selectors use :nth-child against `.pg`'s literal child order (p.pg-lead(1), header div(2), rowlist Pinned(3), sect-h Recent(4), rowlist Recent(5), sect-h Archived(6), rowlist Archived(7)) because the design's heads/lists carry no distinguishing class. INLINE design styles are part of the baseline and captured deliberately (.pg flex:1/overflow:auto; header div margin-bottom:14px; Pinned .sect-h margin:0; .cbtn--pri margin-left:auto; every .chip padding:1px 8px; every .lrow__sub font-family:var(--body); the running .lrow__ic color:var(--jade)). One anchor (rail.badge) intentionally has NO live selector — it is ChatShell chrome measured by a sibling harness; see its expectDivergence / FINDINGS.

elements.label: topbar.title

expectDivergence.fontSize: D5: the sans ladder has no 13.5px rung and rule 1 forbids minting one, so the topbar title keeps --font-size-sm (13px); the 0.5px residual is intentional (Topbar.tsx:123-128, DoD #12)

elements.what: Destination title 'Chats' with the subtitle 'every conversation with the agent' beside it (TITLES, copilot-app.jsx:237). Design .tb-title h1 = 13.5px/600, --disp, letter-spacing -0.01em from the base heading rule (copilot.css:112-121, 404-407); the sibling .sub is 11.5px --mut2 (copilot.css:408-411). LIVE counterpart from PRD-09: `chats` is no longer full-bleed — SUPPRESS_TOPBAR is narrowed to {"run"} (ChatShell.tsx:47), so the shell Topbar renders for `chats` on both hosts. The live title is now a real <h1> [data-testid="topbar-title"] (Topbar.tsx) carrying var(--font-size-sm)/semibold/var(--font-display)/var(--color-text)/letter-spacing -0.01em/margin 0; rendered into the live HTML by render-live-chats-topbar.test.tsx. Tag and tracking now match the design. The one declared expectDivergence is the 13.5→13px font-size (D5, DoD #12): the sans ladder has no 13.5px rung and rule 1 forbids minting one, so the title keeps --font-size-sm. Its lineHeight/width/height rows are the mechanical render-shadow of that single accepted font-size delta (1.2× line-height on BOTH sides; the comparator applies no threshold to width/height), not independent drift.

elements.label: page.container
elements.what: Surface scroll container. Design .pg = padding 20px 24px 40px, max-width 960px (copilot.css:280) + inline flex:1/min-height:0/overflow:auto (copilot-app.jsx:130). Live containerStyle = maxWidth 960, padding '24px 28px 96px', display flex column gap 20 (ChatsArchive.tsx:147-156); the scroll/flex duties moved up to the `section` rootStyle (ChatsArchive.tsx:134-144).

elements.label: page.lead
elements.what: Intro paragraph. Design: 12px / line-height 1.6 / --mut / margin -2px 0 18px / max-width 72ch (copilot.css:281). Live: PageLead.tsx:21-27 uses var(--font-size-xs) + var(--line-height-loose) + var(--color-text-muted), margin 0 (spacing delegated to the container's gap:20).

elements.label: header.row
elements.what: The flex row pairing the Pinned section head with the New-chat CTA. Design: an unclassed wrapper div with inline display:flex/align-items:center/margin-bottom:14px around the .sect-h (copilot-app.jsx:132). Live: SectionHeader.tsx:63-68 IS that flex row (the wrapper and the .sect-h are the same node), gap var(--space-sm), no margin — vertical rhythm comes from the section wrapper's gap:10 (ChatsArchive.tsx:345-349).

elements.label: sect.pinned
elements.what: 'Pinned' section head. Design .sect-h = mono 9.5px, letter-spacing .12em, uppercase, --mut2 (copilot.css:282); inline margin:0 because it lives inside the flex header. Live: headingStyle at SectionHeader.tsx:37-45 on an <h2> — mono, var(--font-size-2xs), var(--font-weight-semibold), same tracking/uppercase/subtle colour.

elements.label: btn.newChat
elements.what: Primary 'New chat'. Design .cbtn + .cbtn--pri + .cbtn--sm = accent fill, --accent-ink, weight 600, padding 4px 9px, font-size 11.5px, radius --r-sm (copilot.css:94/97/110); inline margin-left:auto. Live: design-system <Button variant=primary size=sm> → .ui-button.ui-button--primary.ui-button--sm (ChatsArchive.tsx:317-329), right-aligned by SectionHeader's actionSlotStyle marginInlineStart:auto (SectionHeader.tsx:47-51).

elements.label: list.pinned
elements.what: Pinned list card (1 row). Design .rowlist = column flex, 1px --line border, radius --r (8px), overflow hidden, --panel background (copilot.css:284). Live: RowList.tsx renders a <ul> with the same border/radius/overflow/background tokens.

elements.label: row.running
elements.what: The pinned/running chat row. Design .lrow = flex, gap 12, padding 11px 14px, bottom hairline, transparent bg, font:inherit, cursor pointer (copilot.css:285) on a real <button>. Live: Row.tsx rowStyle:55-66 = flex, gap var(--space-md), padding '10px 12px', on a role=button <div> (Row.tsx:147-160); the hairline moved to the <li> (RowList.tsx).

elements.label: row.running.ic
elements.what: The 28×28 icon TILE. Design: 28×28, radius 7, background --panel3, colour --mut, + inline color:var(--jade) while running (copilot.css:289, copilot-app.jsx:116). Live: Row.tsx iconSlotStyle:70-79 — same 28×28 + radius, but NO background, and the jade tint is applied one level DOWN on the live wrapper span (ChatsArchive.tsx:418-423), so a `color` diff at this anchor is a nesting artifact — the true glyph colour is measured at row.running.ic.svg.

elements.label: row.running.ic.svg
elements.what: Running rows swap the chat glyph for the brand <Mark size={18}/> (viewBox '0 0 400 400'). In the design `.lrow__ic svg{width:15px;height:15px}` (copilot.css:290) beats the width=18 attribute, so it renders 15×15 in jade currentColor. Live renders the same BrandMark (ChatsArchive.tsx:468) but there is no `.lrow__ic svg` size rule, so the 18 attribute stands.

elements.label: row.running.name
elements.what: Title line 'Launch Week ops'. Design .lrow__name = 12.5px / weight 500 / --tx AND itself display:flex gap 8 so the chip sits inline (copilot.css:292). Live splits those duties: the FONT lives on Row.tsx titleStyle:96-104 (var(--font-size-xs), var(--font-weight-semibold)) and the FLEX on the unlabelled titleRowStyle parent (Row.tsx:89-94) — so display/flex/gap diffs at this anchor are a nesting artifact; the typography diff is real.

elements.label: chip.running
elements.what: 'running' pill. Design .chip = mono 10.5px, radius 999px, 1px --line2 border, transparent background, gap 5, + .chip--ok jade text / rgba(87,199,133,.25) border; inline padding:1px 8px overrides the base 2px 8px (copilot.css:112/114). Live: StatusPill.tsx pillStyle:66-84 — height 20, padding '0 8px', var(--font-size-2xs), weight 600, letter-spacing .3px, textTransform uppercase, backgroundColor var(--color-success-bg), border 1px solid var(--color-success).

elements.label: chip.running.dot
elements.what: The 6×6 currentColor dot rendered ONLY for status==='running' (copilot.css:118, copilot-app.jsx:118) — the single real-time affordance in Chats, static in the mock. Live: StatusPill.tsx dotStyle:86-92, gated by showDot from statusTone (ChatsArchive.tsx:476-482). Exactly one exists on both sides.

elements.label: row.running.sub
elements.what: Preview line. Design: 11px --mut2, margin-top 1 (copilot.css:293); CSS defaults it to var(--mono) but the INLINE font-family:var(--body) on every ChatRow flips it to the body face. Live: Row.tsx subStyle:106-112 — var(--font-size-2xs), var(--color-text-subtle), body font by inheritance, spacing via the main column's gap:2 (Row.tsx:81-87).

elements.label: row.running.sub.mono
elements.what: Model name re-monospaced inside the body-font sub-line (.mono, copilot.css:42). Live: modelMonoStyle at ChatsArchive.tsx:426-430 (var(--font-mono) + var(--color-text-muted)). All 8 rows carry one on both sides, including local models.

elements.label: row.running.time
elements.what: Relative timestamp. Design 'now' — mono 10.5px --mut2, flex:none (copilot.css:295); the fixture vocabulary is relative/coarse: now / 2h / 3h / 1d / Mon. Live: Row.tsx metaStyle:114-120 (var(--font-mono), var(--font-size-2xs), var(--color-text-subtle)), text produced by util/time.ts formatRelativeTime.

elements.label: sect.recent
elements.what: 'Recent' section head — no inline override in the design, so the full .sect-h margin 22px 0 10px applies (copilot.css:282); that 22px is what separates the three list cards. Live has margin 0 and relies on sectionsStyle gap:24 (ChatsArchive.tsx:158-162) + sectionWrapStyle gap:10.

elements.label: row.done.ic
elements.what: Non-live row icon tile on 'Weekly treasury reconciliation': no inline colour, so it stays --mut and renders Icon.chats. The jade-vs-mut contrast against row.running.ic IS the liveness signal at row level; the tile background (--panel3 in the design) is what makes it read as a tile at all.

elements.label: chip.paused
elements.what: 'paused' pill on 'Rebalance LP positions' (3rd Recent row) — .chip--warn = --amber text, rgba(232,180,94,.25) border, transparent fill, no dot (copilot.css:116). Live: StatusPill warning tone (var(--color-warning) fg, var(--color-warning-bg) fill, solid var(--color-warning) border). Paused stays inside Recent on both sides.

elements.label: sect.archived
elements.what: 'Archived · history' section head — note the middot qualifier, not a bare 'Archived'. Live copy matches byte-for-byte (SECTION_HEADINGS, ChatsArchive.tsx:59-63). Archived chats stay on the same page on both sides.

elements.label: chip.archived
elements.what: 'archived' pill on 'Competitor launch digest' — .chip--off = --mut2 text inheriting the base --line2 border and transparent fill (copilot.css:117). Live: StatusPill muted tone (var(--color-text-subtle) fg, var(--color-surface-muted) fill, var(--color-border) border).

elements.label: sect.count.pill
elements.what: LIVE-ONLY probe. The live SectionHeader renders a muted count pill after every section label (ChatsArchive.tsx:369-376) — 3 of them, which is why live has 11 status-pills against the design's 8 chips. The design has no chip inside any .sect-h, so the design selector is expected to miss and compare.mjs reports this as extra-in-live (INFO).

elements.label: rail.badge
elements.expectDivergence: OUT OF HARNESS SCOPE, not drift: the rail is ChatShell chrome, not part of the Chats destination component this harness renders (render-live-chats-topbar.test.tsx mounts Topbar + ChatsArchive, not the rail). The live rail badge is measured by the sibling harness lib/render-live-rail-badge.test.tsx.
elements.what: The '1' active-run badge on the rail's Run item, present on every non-Run destination (copilot-app.jsx:299, copilot.css:73 — accent fill, --accent-ink, mono 8.5px/700, min-width 13px, 13px tall, absolute top:3/right:3). It is how Chats signals a run is still live elsewhere.
